page_title: Attack on Titan: Before the Fall (Disambiguation)
text:
Attack on Titan: Before the Fall is the spinoff prequel trilogy to the Attack on Titan manga, written by Ryō Suzukaze. This title may also apply to:
Attack on Titan: Before the Fall - The first novel in the series.
Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 2 - The second novel in the series.
Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 3 - The third novel in the series.
Attack on Titan: Before the Fall (Manga) - The manga adaptation of said novels illustrated by Satoshi Shiki.
